stemHtml: At the approach of a warm front (northern hemisphere) the wind direction changes from the surface up to the tropopause. The effect of this change is that the wind…

options.a: veers in the friction layer and backs above the friction layer
options.b: backs in the friction layer and veers above the friction layer
options.c: veers in the friction layer and veers above the friction layer
options.d: backs in the friction layer and backs above the friction layer
